# rivalDrop

rivalDrop sells white-label competitor teardown reports to marketing agencies and ecommerce consultancies.

## Core offer: the $149 Agency Pilot

A one-time white-label competitor teardown PDF. The agency pays $149 once, fills in an intake form, and receives a finished report carrying the agency's own name and logo within three business days. There is no subscription and nothing recurring.

The agency provides:

- agency name, website, and work email
- an optional agency logo URL for report branding
- the client's store name and public store URL
- up to three competitor store URLs
- an optional focus area such as pricing, SEO, product gaps, or restocks

rivalDrop returns a finished PDF brief. The report uses public storefront data only and includes practical notes on pricing gaps, catalog gaps, bestseller signals, stock-out or restock clues, SEO gaps, and source notes for every material claim.

## Purchase path

Payment is a Stripe one-time checkout: https://buy.stripe.com/5kQfZj4FD6iNg6W32u7Re0d
After payment the buyer completes the intake form at https://rivaldrop.com/onboard/

## Important pages

- Home: https://rivaldrop.com/
- Sample PDF: https://rivaldrop.com/RivalDrop_sample_report.pdf
- Free public teardowns: https://rivaldrop.com/teardowns/
- Privacy: https://rivaldrop.com/privacy.html
- Terms: https://rivaldrop.com/terms.html

## Boundaries

- Public data only.
- No Shopify admin access.
- No passwords, private admin links, or customer data.
- Non-Shopify competitors can be reviewed, but data may be lighter.
- Reports are delivered to the purchasing agency, which resells or presents them under its own brand.
- The brief gives evidence and suggested moves, not financial, legal, or professional advice.

Last updated: 2026-07-11
